case_title: MASE, SOOLEUPU VS JAMESON, DANA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASE, SOOLEUPU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMESON, DANA MORTENSON, SILIVA W. $1,310.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,332.00, DEFENDANT JAMESON, DANA FAILED TO APPEAR.
